title: BEM-867 analyze latest report
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.md')
mail = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md')
report_text = report.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if report.exists() else ''
mail_text = mail.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if mail.exists() else ''
low = report_text.lower()
if 'bem867_battle_audit_response' in low or 'from_claude' in low:
    status = 'REPORT_MENTIONS_MAILBOX'
elif '| changed files | none |' in low or 'changed files | none' in low or 'changed_files: none' in low:
    status = 'REPORT_CHANGED_FILES_NONE_AFTER_PATCH'
elif 'success' in low:
    status = 'REPORT_SUCCESS_UNCLEAR'
elif report.exists():
    status = 'REPORT_EXISTS_UNCLEAR'
else:
    status = 'REPORT_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_LATEST_REPORT_AFTER_PATCH_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 latest report after patch\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nReport text:\n' + report_text[:5000] + '\n\nMailbox text:\n' + mail_text[:3000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 latest report after patch: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
